v.CNV: 摩西召集了以色列全体会众，对他们说：“这就是耶和华吩咐的话，要你们遵行。
v.ESV: Moses assembled all the congregation of the people of Israel and said to them, “These are the things that the Lord has commanded you to do.
v.GAE: 모세가 이스라엘 자손의 온 회중을 모으고 그들에게 이르되 여호와께서 너희에게 명령하사 행하게 하신 말씀이 이러하니라
v.KJV: And Moses gathered all the congregation of the children of Israel together, and said unto them, These are the words which the LORD hath commanded, that ye should do them.
v.NASB: Then Moses assembled all the congregation of the sons of Israel, and said to them, 'These are the things that the LORD has commanded you to do:
v.NIV: Moses assembled the whole Israelite community and said to them, “These are the things the Lord has commanded you to do:
v.NRSV: Moses assembled all the congregation of the Israelites and said to them: These are the things that the LORD has commanded you to do:
v.SAENEW: 모세는 이스라엘 자손의 온 회중을 모아 놓고 말하였다. "주님께서 당신들에게 실천하라고 명하신 말씀은 이러합니다.
v.WLB: 모세는 온 이스라엘 회중을 모으고 그들에게 말했습니다. “여호와께서 너희에게 행하라고 명령하셨는데

v.CNV: 六日要工作，但第七日是你们的圣日，要归耶和华为休息的安息日。凡是在这日工作的，必须把他处死。
v.ESV: Six days work shall be done, but on the seventh day you shall have a Sabbath of solemn rest, holy to the Lord . Whoever does any work on it shall be put to death.
v.GAE: 엿새 동안은 일하고 일곱째 날은 너희를 위한 거룩한 날이니 여호와께 엄숙한 안식일이라 누구든지 이 날에 일하는 자는 죽일지니
v.KJV: Six days shall work be done, but on the seventh day there shall be to you an holy day, a sabbath of rest to the LORD: whosoever doeth work therein shall be put to death.
v.NASB: 'For six days work may be done, but on the seventh day you shall have a holy day, a sabbath of complete rest to the LORD; whoever does any work on it shall be put to death.
v.NIV: For six days, work is to be done, but the seventh day shall be your holy day, a day of sabbath rest to the Lord . Whoever does any work on it is to be put to death.
v.NRSV: Six days shall work be done, but on the seventh day you shall have a holy sabbath of solemn rest to the LORD; whoever does any work on it shall be put to death.
v.SAENEW: 엿새 동안은 일을 해야 합니다. 그러나 이렛날은 당신들에게 거룩한 날, 곧 주님께 바친 완전히 쉬는 안식일이므로, 그 날에 일을 하는 사람은 누구든지 사형에 처해야 합니다.
v.WLB: 6일 동안은 일해야 하지만 일곱째 날은 너희의 거룩한 날, 여호와께는 쉬는 안식일이니 누구든 이날에 일하는 사람은 죽임당해야 한다.

v.CNV: 在安息日，不可在你们任何的住处生火。”
v.ESV: You shall kindle no fire in all your dwelling places on the Sabbath day.”
v.GAE: 안식일에는 너희의 모든 처소에서 불도 피우지 말지니라
v.KJV: Ye shall kindle no fire throughout your habitations upon the sabbath day.
v.NASB: 'You shall not kindle a fire in any of your dwellings on the sabbath day.'
v.NIV: Do not light a fire in any of your dwellings on the Sabbath day. ”
v.NRSV: You shall kindle no fire in all your dwellings on the sabbath day.
v.SAENEW: 안식일에는 당신들이 사는 어디에서도 불을 피워서는 안 됩니다."
v.WLB: 안식일에는 너희가 있는 곳에 불조차도 피우지 말라.”

v.CNV: 摩西告诉以色列全体会众说：“耶和华吩咐的是这样，他说：
v.ESV: Moses said to all the congregation of the people of Israel, “This is the thing that the Lord has commanded.
v.GAE: 모세가 이스라엘 자손의 온 회중에게 말하여 이르되 여호와께서 명령하신 일이 이러하니라 이르시기를
v.KJV: And Moses spake unto all the congregation of the children of Israel, saying, This is the thing which the LORD commanded, saying,
v.NASB: Moses spoke to all the congregation of the sons of Israel, saying, 'This is the thing which the LORD has commanded, saying,
v.NIV: Moses said to the whole Israelite community, “This is what the Lord has commanded:
v.NRSV: Moses said to all the congregation of the Israelites: This is the thing that the LORD has commanded:
v.SAENEW: 모세가 이스라엘 자손의 온 회중에게 말하였다. "이것은 주님께서 내리신 명령입니다.
v.WLB: 모세가 온 이스라엘 회중에게 말했습니다. “여호와께서 명령하셨다.

v.CNV: ‘你们要从你们中间拿礼物来给耶和华，凡是甘心乐意的，都可以把耶和华的礼物带来，就是金、银、铜、
v.ESV: Take from among you a contribution to the Lord . Whoever is of a generous heart, let him bring the Lord 's contribution: gold, silver, and bronze;
v.GAE: 너희의 소유 중에서 너희는 여호와께 드릴 것을 택하되 마음에 원하는 자는 누구든지 그것을 가져다가 여호와께 드릴지니 곧 금과 은과 놋과
v.KJV: Take ye from among you an offering unto the LORD: whosoever is of a willing heart, let him bring it, an offering of the LORD; gold, and silver, and brass,
v.NASB: 'Take from among you a contribution to the LORD; whoever is of a willing heart, let him bring it as the LORD'S contribution: gold, silver, and bronze,
v.NIV: From what you have, take an offering for the Lord . Everyone who is willing is to bring to the Lord an offering of gold, silver and bronze;
v.NRSV: Take from among you an offering to the LORD; let whoever is of a generous heart bring the LORD’s offering: gold, silver, and bronze;
v.SAENEW: 당신들은 각자의 소유 가운데서 주님께 바칠 예물을 가져 오십시오. 바치고 싶은 사람은 누구나 주님께 예물을 바치십시오. 곧 금과 은과 동과,
v.WLB: 너희가 가진 것 가운데 여호와를 위해 예물을 가져오라. 마음이 있는 사람은 누구나 여호와께 예물을 가져오는데 그것은 금, 은, 청동,

v.CNV: 蓝色紫色朱红色线、细麻、山羊毛、
v.ESV: blue and purple and scarlet yarns and fine twined linen; goats' hair,
v.GAE: 청색 자색 홍색 실과 가는 베 실과 염소 털과
v.KJV: And blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine linen, and goats’ hair,
v.NASB: and blue, purple and scarlet material, fine linen, goats' hair,
v.NIV: blue, purple and scarlet yarn and fine linen; goat hair;
v.NRSV: blue, purple, and crimson yarns, and fine linen; goats’ hair,
v.SAENEW: 청색 실과 자주색 실과 홍색 실과 가는 모시 실과 염소 털과,
v.WLB: 청색 실, 자주색 실, 홍색 실, 고운 베실, 염소 털,

v.CNV: 染红的公羊皮、海狗皮、皂荚木、
v.ESV: tanned rams' skins, and goatskins; acacia wood,
v.GAE: 붉은 물 들인 숫양의 가죽과 해달의 가죽과 조각목과
v.KJV: And rams’ skins dyed red, and badgers’ skins, and shittim wood,
v.NASB: and rams' skins dyed red, and porpoise skins, and acacia wood,
v.NIV: ram skins dyed red and another type of durable leather ; acacia wood;
v.NRSV: tanned rams’ skins, and fine leather; acacia wood,
v.SAENEW: 붉게 물들인 숫양 가죽과 돌고래 가죽과, 아카시아 나무와,
v.WLB: 붉게 물들인 양 가죽, 해달 가죽, 싯딤 나무,

v.CNV: 灯油，以及作膏油和芬芳的香的香料、
v.ESV: oil for the light, spices for the anointing oil and for the fragrant incense,
v.GAE: 등유와 및 관유에 드는 향품과 분향할 향을 만드는 향품과
v.KJV: And oil for the light, and spices for anointing oil, and for the sweet incense,
v.NASB: and oil for lighting, and spices for the anointing oil, and for the fragrant incense,
v.NIV: olive oil for the light; spices for the anointing oil and for the fragrant incense;
v.NRSV: oil for the light, spices for the anointing oil and for the fragrant incense,
v.SAENEW: 등잔용 기름과 예식용 기름에 넣는 향품과 분향할 향에 넣는 향품과,
v.WLB: 등잔유, 기름 부을 때 쓰는 기름, 분향할 때 쓰는 향료,

v.CNV: 红玛瑙宝石，以及可以镶嵌在以弗得和胸牌上的宝石。
v.ESV: and onyx stones and stones for setting, for the ephod and for the breastpiece.
v.GAE: 호마노며 에봇과 흉패에 물릴 보석이니라
v.KJV: And onyx stones, and stones to be set for the ephod, and for the breastplate.
v.NASB: and onyx stones and setting stones for the ephod and for the breastpiece.
v.NIV: and onyx stones and other gems to be mounted on the ephod and breastpiece.
v.NRSV: and onyx stones and gems to be set in the ephod and the breastpiece.
v.SAENEW: 에봇과 가슴받이에 박을 홍옥수와 그 밖의 보석들입니다."
v.WLB: 에봇과 가슴패에 박을 호마노와 그 외의 보석들이다.

v.CNV: “‘你们中间凡是心里有智慧的都要来，做耶和华吩咐的一切，
v.ESV: “Let every skillful craftsman among you come and make all that the Lord has commanded:
v.GAE: 무릇 너희 중 마음이 지혜로운 자는 와서 여호와께서 명령하신 것을 다 만들지니
v.KJV: And every wise hearted among you shall come, and make all that the LORD hath commanded;
v.NASB: 'Let every skillful man among you come, and make all that the LORD has commanded:
v.NIV: “All who are skilled among you are to come and make everything the Lord has commanded:
v.NRSV: All who are skillful among you shall come and make all that the LORD has commanded: the tabernacle,
v.SAENEW: "당신들 가운데 기술 있는 사람은 모두 와서, 주님께서 명하신 모든 것을 만드십시오.
v.WLB: 너희 가운데 기술이 있는 사람들은 모두 와서 여호와께서 명령하신 모든 것들을 만들어야 한다.

v.CNV: 就是做帐幕、帐幕的棚罩、帐幕的盖、钩子、木板、横闩、柱子、帐幕的座、

v.KJV: The tabernacle, his tent, and his covering, his taches, and his boards, his bars, his pillars, and his sockets,
v.NASB: the tabernacle, its tent and its covering, its hooks and its boards, its bars, its pillars, and its sockets;
v.NIV: the tabernacle with its tent and its covering, clasps, frames, crossbars, posts and bases;
v.NRSV: its tent and its covering, its clasps and its frames, its bars, its pillars, and its bases;
v.SAENEW: 만들 것은, 성막과 그 덮개와 그 윗덮개와, 갈고리와 널빤지와 가로다지와 기둥과 밑받침과,

v.KJV: The ark, and the staves thereof, with the mercy seat, and the vail of the covering,
v.NASB: the ark and its poles, the mercy seat, and the curtain of the screen;
v.NIV: the ark with its poles and the atonement cover and the curtain that shields it;
v.NRSV: the ark with its poles, the mercy seat, and the curtain for the screen;

v.WLB: 증거궤와 그 장대와 그것을 가릴 속죄 덮개와 휘장,

v.CNV: 桌子、桌子的杠、桌子的一切器具、陈设饼、
v.ESV: the table with its poles and all its utensils, and the bread of the Presence;
v.GAE: 상과 그 채와 그 모든 기구와 진설병과
v.KJV: The table, and his staves, and all his vessels, and the shewbread,
v.NASB: the table and its poles, and all its utensils, and the bread of the Presence;
v.NIV: the table with its poles and all its articles and the bread of the Presence;
v.NRSV: the table with its poles and all its utensils, and the bread of the Presence;

v.WLB: 상과 그 장대와 그 모든 기구들과 진설병,

v.NIV: the lampstand that is for light with its accessories, lamps and oil for the light;
v.NRSV: the lampstand also for the light, with its utensils and its lamps, and the oil for the light;
v.SAENEW: 불을 켤 등잔대와 그 기구와 등잔과 등잔용 기름과,

v.ESV: and the altar of incense, with its poles, and the anointing oil and the fragrant incense, and the screen for the door, at the door of the tabernacle;
v.GAE: 분향단과 그 채와 관유와 분향할 향품과 성막 문의 휘장과

v.NASB: and the altar of incense and its poles, and the anointing oil and the fragrant incense, and the screen for the doorway at the entrance of the tabernacle;
v.NIV: the altar of incense with its poles, the anointing oil and the fragrant incense; the curtain for the doorway at the entrance to the tabernacle;
v.NRSV: and the altar of incense, with its poles, and the anointing oil and the fragrant incense, and the screen for the entrance, the entrance of the tabernacle;
v.SAENEW: 분향단과 단을 옮기는 데 쓸 채와 예식용 기름과 분향할 향과 성막 어귀의 휘장과,
v.WLB: 분향 제단과 그 장대, 기름 부을 때 쓰는 기름과 향료, 성막 문 앞에 칠 휘장,

v.CNV: 燔祭坛、坛的铜网、坛杠、坛的一切器具、洗濯盆、盆座、

v.KJV: The altar of burnt offering, with his brasen grate, his staves, and all his vessels, the laver and his foot,
v.NASB: the altar of burnt offering with its bronze grating, its poles, and all its utensils, the basin and its stand;
v.NIV: the altar of burnt offering with its bronze grating, its poles and all its utensils; the bronze basin with its stand;
v.NRSV: the altar of burnt offering, with its grating of bronze, its poles, and all its utensils, the basin with its stand;

v.CNV: 院子的帷子、帷子的柱子、帷子的座、院子的门帘、

v.KJV: The hangings of the court, his pillars, and their sockets, and the hanging for the door of the court,

v.NIV: the curtains of the courtyard with its posts and bases, and the curtain for the entrance to the courtyard;

v.NIV: the tent pegs for the tabernacle and for the courtyard, and their ropes;
v.NRSV: the pegs of the tabernacle and the pegs of the court, and their cords;

v.CNV: 在圣所供职用的彩衣、祭司亚伦的圣衣和他儿子供祭司职用的衣服。’”
v.ESV: the finely worked garments for ministering in the Holy Place, the holy garments for Aaron the priest, and the garments of his sons, for their service as priests.”
v.GAE: 성소에서 섬기기 위하여 정교하게 만든 옷 곧 제사 직분을 행할 때에 입는 제사장 아론의 거룩한 옷과 그의 아들들의 옷이니라
v.KJV: The cloths of service, to do service in the holy place, the holy garments for Aaron the priest, and the garments of his sons, to minister in the priest’s office.
v.NASB: the woven garments for ministering in the holy place, the holy garments for Aaron the priest and the garments of his sons, to minister as priests.''
v.NIV: the woven garments worn for ministering in the sanctuary—both the sacred garments for Aaron the priest and the garments for his sons when they serve as priests.”
v.NRSV: the finely worked vestments for ministering in the holy place, the holy vestments for the priest Aaron, and the vestments of his sons, for their service as priests.
v.SAENEW: 성소에서 예식을 올릴 때에 입는 잘 짠 옷과, 곧 제사장 아론의 거룩한 옷과 그 아들들이 제사장 일을 할 때에 입는 옷입니다."
v.WLB: 성소에서 섬길 때 입는 짠 옷들, 곧 제사장으로 섬길 때 입는 제사장 아론과 그의 아들들의 옷이다.”

v.CNV: 以色列全体会众从摩西面前离去了。
v.ESV: Then all the congregation of the people of Israel departed from the presence of Moses.
v.GAE: 이스라엘 자손의 온 회중이 모세 앞에서 물러갔더니
v.KJV: And all the congregation of the children of Israel departed from the presence of Moses.
v.NASB: Then all the congregation of the sons of Israel departed from Moses' presence.
v.NIV: Then the whole Israelite community withdrew from Moses’ presence,
v.NRSV: Then all the congregation of the Israelites withdrew from the presence of Moses.
v.SAENEW: 이스라엘 자손의 온 회중은 모세 앞에서 물러나왔다.
v.WLB: 그러자 온 이스라엘 회중이 모세 앞에서 물러갔습니다.

v.CNV: 凡是心里受感、灵里乐意的，都来了；他们把耶和华的礼物都带来了，用作会幕的工程和会幕中的一切使用，又用来做圣衣。
v.ESV: And they came, everyone whose heart stirred him, and everyone whose spirit moved him, and brought the Lord 's contribution to be used for the tent of meeting, and for all its service, and for the holy garments.
v.GAE: 마음이 감동된 모든 자와 자원하는 모든 자가 와서 회막을 짓기 위하여 그 속에서 쓸 모든 것을 위하여, 거룩한 옷을 위하여 예물을 가져다가 여호와께 드렸으니
v.KJV: And they came, every one whose heart stirred him up, and every one whom his spirit made willing, and they brought the LORD’S offering to the work of the tabernacle of the congregation, and for all his service, and for the holy garments.
v.NASB: Everyone whose heart stirred him and everyone whose spirit moved him came and brought the LORD'S contribution for the work of the tent of meeting and for all its service and for the holy garments.
v.NIV: and everyone who was willing and whose heart moved them came and brought an offering to the Lord for the work on the tent of meeting, for all its service, and for the sacred garments.
v.NRSV: And they came, everyone whose heart was stirred, and everyone whose spirit was willing, and brought the LORD’s offering to be used for the tent of meeting, and for all its service, and for the sacred vestments.
v.SAENEW: 마음이 감동되어 스스로 그렇게 하기를 원하는 사람은 모두 나서서, 회막과 그 곳의 제사에 필요한 모든 것과 거룩한 옷을 만들 수 있도록, 갖가지 예물을 주님께 가져 왔다.
v.WLB: 그 말에 감동을 받아 자원하는 사람들은 모두 와서 회막 짓는 일에, 그 모든 섬기는 일에, 거룩한 옷 짓는 데 필요한 예물을 여호와께 가져왔습니다.

v.CNV: 凡是甘心乐意的，不论男女，都来了，把金针、耳环、戒指、手钏和各样的金器都送来。他们各人都把金子作礼物呈献给耶和华。
v.ESV: So they came, both men and women. All who were of a willing heart brought brooches and earrings and signet rings and armlets, all sorts of gold objects, every man dedicating an offering of gold to the Lord .
v.GAE: 곧 마음에 원하는 남녀가 와서 팔찌와 귀고리와 가락지와 목걸이와 여러 가지 금품을 가져다가 사람마다 여호와께 금 예물을 드렸으며
v.KJV: And they came, both men and women, as many as were willing hearted, and brought bracelets, and earrings, and rings, and tablets, all jewels of gold: and every man that offered offered an offering of gold unto the LORD.
v.NASB: Then all whose hearts moved them, both men and women, came and brought brooches and earrings and signet rings and bracelets, all articles of gold; so did every man who presented an offering of gold to the LORD.
v.NIV: All who were willing, men and women alike, came and brought gold jewelry of all kinds: brooches, earrings, rings and ornaments. They all presented their gold as a wave offering to the Lord .
v.NRSV: So they came, both men and women; all who were of a willing heart brought brooches and earrings and signet rings and pendants, all sorts of gold objects, everyone bringing an offering of gold to the LORD.
v.SAENEW: 남녀 구별 없이 스스로 원하는 사람은 누구나 장식 핀과 귀고리와 반지와 목걸이 등 온갖 금붙이를 가져 왔으며, 그 모든 사람이 금붙이를 흔들어서 주님께 바쳤다.
v.WLB: 자원하는 마음이 생긴 사람들은 남녀 할 것 없이 다들 팔찌, 귀고리, 반지, 장신구 등 온갖 종류의 금 패물을 가져왔고 모두가 그 금을 여호와께 요제로 흔들어 드렸습니다.

v.CNV: 凡是有蓝色紫色朱红色线、细麻、山羊毛、染红的公羊皮、海狗皮的，都送了来。
v.ESV: And every one who possessed blue or purple or scarlet yarns or fine linen or goats' hair or tanned rams' skins or goatskins brought them.
v.GAE: 무릇 청색 자색 홍색 실과 가는 베 실과 염소 털과 붉은 물 들인 숫양의 가죽과 해달의 가죽이 있는 자도 가져왔으며
v.KJV: And every man, with whom was found blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine linen, and goats’ hair, and red skins of rams, and badgers’ skins, brought them.
v.NASB: Every man, who had in his possession blue and purple and scarlet material and fine linen and goats' hair and rams' skins dyed red and porpoise skins, brought them.
v.NIV: Everyone who had blue, purple or scarlet yarn or fine linen, or goat hair, ram skins dyed red or the other durable leather brought them.
v.NRSV: And everyone who possessed blue or purple or crimson yarn or fine linen or goats’ hair or tanned rams’ skins or fine leather, brought them.
v.SAENEW: 그리고 청색 실과 자주색 실과 홍색 실과 가는 모시 실과 염소 털과 붉게 물들인 숫양 가죽과 돌고래 가죽을 가진 사람들은 모두 그 물건들을 가져 왔다.
v.WLB: 그리고 청색 실, 자주색 실, 홍색 실, 고운 베실, 염소 털, 붉게 물들인 양 가죽이나 해달 가죽을 가진 사람들은 모두 그것들을 가져왔습니다.

v.CNV: 凡是奉献银子和铜为礼物的，都带了来作耶和华的礼物；凡是有皂荚木可以用作工程上任何使用的，都带了来。
v.ESV: Everyone who could make a contribution of silver or bronze brought it as the Lord 's contribution. And every one who possessed acacia wood of any use in the work brought it.
v.GAE: 은과 놋으로 예물을 삼는 모든 자가 가져다가 여호와께 드렸으며 섬기는 일에 소용되는 조각목이 있는 모든 자는 가져왔으며
v.KJV: Every one that did offer an offering of silver and brass brought the LORD’S offering: and every man, with whom was found shittim wood for any work of the service, brought it.
v.NASB: Everyone who could make a contribution of silver and bronze brought the LORD'S contribution; and every man who had in his possession acacia wood for any work of the service brought it.
v.NIV: Those presenting an offering of silver or bronze brought it as an offering to the Lord , and everyone who had acacia wood for any part of the work brought it.
v.NRSV: Everyone who could make an offering of silver or bronze brought it as the LORD’s offering; and everyone who possessed acacia wood of any use in the work, brought it.
v.SAENEW: 은과 동을 예물로 바칠 수 있는 사람들은 모두 주님께 그 물건들을 예물로 가져 왔고, 제사 기구를 만드는 데 쓰는 아카시아 나무를 가진 사람들은 모두 그 나무를 가져 왔다.
v.WLB: 은이나 청동을 가졌으면 그것을 여호와께 예물로 가져왔고 그 일에 필요한 싯딤 나무가 있는 사람들은 그것들을 가져왔습니다.

v.CNV: 凡是心中有智慧的妇女都亲手纺织，把所纺的蓝色紫色朱红色线都带了来。
v.ESV: And every skillful woman spun with her hands, and they all brought what they had spun in blue and purple and scarlet yarns and fine twined linen.
v.GAE: 마음이 슬기로운 모든 여인은 손수 실을 빼고 그 뺀 청색 자색 홍색 실과 가는 베 실을 가져왔으며
v.KJV: And all the women that were wise hearted did spin with their hands, and brought that which they had spun, both of blue, and of purple, and of scarlet, and of fine linen.
v.NASB: All the skilled women spun with their hands, and brought what they had spun, in blue and purple and scarlet material and in fine linen.
v.NIV: Every skilled woman spun with her hands and brought what she had spun—blue, purple or scarlet yarn or fine linen.
v.NRSV: All the skillful women spun with their hands, and brought what they had spun in blue and purple and crimson yarns and fine linen;
v.SAENEW: 재주 있는 여자들은 모두 손수 실을 자아서, 그 자은 청색 실과 자주색 실과 홍색 실과 가는 모시 실을 가져 왔다.
v.WLB: 솜씨 좋은 여자들은 직접 손으로 실을 자았고 자기들이 자아 만든 청색 실, 자주색 실, 홍색 실, 고운 베실을 가져왔습니다.

v.CNV: 凡是有心意又有智慧的妇女，都纺山羊毛。
v.ESV: All the women whose hearts stirred them to use their skill spun the goats' hair.
v.GAE: 마음에 감동을 받아 슬기로운 모든 여인은 염소 털로 실을 뽑았으며
v.KJV: And all the women whose heart stirred them up in wisdom spun goats’ hair.
v.NASB: All the women whose heart stirred with a skill spun the goats' hair.
v.NIV: And all the women who were willing and had the skill spun the goat hair.
v.NRSV: all the women whose hearts moved them to use their skill spun the goats’ hair.
v.SAENEW: 타고난 재주가 있는 여자들은 모두 염소 털로 실을 자았다.
v.WLB: 그리고 뛰어난 솜씨를 가진 모든 여자들은 염소 털을 자았습니다.

v.CNV: 首领把红玛瑙宝石，以及可以镶嵌在以弗得和胸牌上的宝石都带了来；
v.ESV: And the leaders brought onyx stones and stones to be set, for the ephod and for the breastpiece,
v.GAE: 모든 족장은 호마노와 및 에봇과 흉패에 물릴 보석을 가져왔으며
v.KJV: And the rulers brought onyx stones, and stones to be set, for the ephod, and for the breastplate;
v.NASB: The rulers brought the onyx stones and the stones for setting for the ephod and for the breastpiece;
v.NIV: The leaders brought onyx stones and other gems to be mounted on the ephod and breastpiece.
v.NRSV: And the leaders brought onyx stones and gems to be set in the ephod and the breastpiece,
v.SAENEW: 지도자들은 에봇과 가슴받이에 박을 홍옥수를 비롯한 그 밖의 보석들과
v.WLB: 지도자들은 에봇과 가슴패에 박을 호마노와 그 외의 보석들을 가져왔습니다.

v.CNV: 又带来了香料、点灯用的油、膏油、芬芳的香。
v.ESV: and spices and oil for the light, and for the anointing oil, and for the fragrant incense.
v.GAE: 등불과 관유와 분향할 향에 소용되는 기름과 향품을 가져왔으니
v.KJV: And spice, and oil for the light, and for the anointing oil, and for the sweet incense.
v.NASB: and the spice and the oil for the light and for the anointing oil and for the fragrant incense.
v.NIV: They also brought spices and olive oil for the light and for the anointing oil and for the fragrant incense.
v.NRSV: and spices and oil for the light, and for the anointing oil, and for the fragrant incense.
v.SAENEW: 향품과 등잔용 기름과 예식용 기름과 분향할 향에 필요한 기름을 가져 왔다.
v.WLB: 그들은 또 향품과 등잔유와 기름 부음용 기름과 분향용 기름도 가져왔습니다.

v.CNV: 以色列人无论男女，凡是甘心乐意为作耶和华借摩西吩咐的一切工程的，都把自愿奉献的礼物带了来献给耶和华。
v.ESV: All the men and women, the people of Israel, whose heart moved them to bring anything for the work that the Lord had commanded by Moses to be done brought it as a freewill offering to the Lord .
v.GAE: 마음에 자원하는 남녀는 누구나 여호와께서 모세의 손을 빌어 명령하신 모든 것을 만들기 위하여 물품을 드렸으니 이것이 이스라엘 자손이 여호와께 자원하여 드린 예물이니라
v.KJV: The children of Israel brought a willing offering unto the LORD, every man and woman, whose heart made them willing to bring for all manner of work, which the LORD had commanded to be made by the hand of Moses.
v.NASB: The Israelites, all the men and women, whose heart moved them to bring material for all the work, which the LORD had commanded through Moses to be done, brought a freewill offering to the LORD.
v.NIV: All the Israelite men and women who were willing brought to the Lord freewill offerings for all the work the Lord through Moses had commanded them to do.
v.NRSV: All the Israelite men and women whose hearts made them willing to bring anything for the work that the LORD had commanded by Moses to be done, brought it as a freewill offering to the LORD.
v.SAENEW: 스스로 바치고 싶어 하는 모든 남녀 이스라엘 자손이, 주님께서 모세를 시켜 명하신 모든 것을 만들려고, 기쁜 마음으로 물품을 가져다가 주님께 바쳤다.
v.WLB: 모든 이스라엘 자손들은 남녀 할 것 없이 여호와께서 모세의 손으로 만들도록 명령하신 모든 일에 필요한 것들을 기꺼이 예물로 여호와께 가져온 것입니다.

v.CNV: 摩西对以色列人说：“看哪，犹大支派中户珥的孙子、乌利的儿子比撒列，耶和华已经提名召他，
v.ESV: Then Moses said to the people of Israel, “See, the Lord has called by name Bezalel the son of Uri, son of Hur, of the tribe of Judah;
v.GAE: 모세가 이스라엘 자손에게 이르되 볼지어다 여호와께서 유다 지파 훌의 손자요 우리의 아들인 브살렐을 지명하여 부르시고
v.KJV: And Moses said unto the children of Israel, See, the LORD hath called by name Bezaleel the son of Uri, the son of Hur, of the tribe of Judah;
v.NASB: Then Moses said to the sons of Israel, 'See, the LORD has called by name Bezalel the son of Uri, the son of Hur, of the tribe of Judah.
v.NIV: Then Moses said to the Israelites, “See, the Lord has chosen Bezalel son of Uri, the son of Hur, of the tribe of Judah,
v.NRSV: Then Moses said to the Israelites: See, the LORD has called by name Bezalel son of Uri son of Hur, of the tribe of Judah;
v.SAENEW: 모세가 이스라엘 자손에게 말하였다. "주님께서 유다 지파 사람, 훌의 손자이며 우리의 아들인 브살렐을 지명하여 부르셔서,
v.WLB: 그러고 나서 모세는 이스라엘 백성들에게 말했습니다. “보라. 여호와께서 유다 지파 훌의 손자이며 우리의 아들인 브살렐의 이름을 불러

v.CNV: 又用　神的灵充满他，使他有智慧，有聪明，有知识，有作一切巧工的技能。
v.ESV: and he has filled him with the Spirit of God, with skill, with intelligence, with knowledge, and with all craftsmanship,
v.GAE: 하나님의 영을 그에게 충만하게 하여 지혜와 총명과 지식으로 여러 가지 일을 하게 하시되
v.KJV: And he hath filled him with the spirit of God, in wisdom, in understanding, and in knowledge, and in all manner of workmanship;
v.NASB: 'And He has filled him with the Spirit of God, in wisdom, in understanding and in knowledge and in all craftsmanship;
v.NIV: and he has filled him with the Spirit of God, with wisdom, with understanding, with knowledge and with all kinds of skills —
v.NRSV: he has filled him with divine spirit, with skill, intelligence, and knowledge in every kind of craft,
v.SAENEW: 그에게 하나님의 영을 가득하게 하시고, 지혜와 총명과 지식과 온갖 기술을 갖추게 하셨습니다.
v.WLB: 하나님의 영이 가득하고 재능과 능력과 지식으로 모든 일들을 하게 하셨다.

v.CNV: 能巧设图案，用金、银、铜制造各物；
v.ESV: to devise artistic designs, to work in gold and silver and bronze,
v.GAE: 금과 은과 놋으로 제작하는 기술을 고안하게 하시며
v.KJV: And to devise curious works, to work in gold, and in silver, and in brass,
v.NASB: to make designs for working in gold and in silver and in bronze,
v.NIV: to make artistic designs for work in gold, silver and bronze,
v.NRSV: to devise artistic designs, to work in gold, silver, and bronze,
v.SAENEW: 그래서 그는 여러 가지를 생각해 내어, 그 생각해 낸 것을 금과 은과 놋으로 만들고,
v.WLB: 금, 은, 청동으로 아름답게 고안하고

v.CNV: 又能雕刻宝石，用来镶嵌；又能雕刻木头，用来制造各种巧工。
v.ESV: in cutting stones for setting, and in carving wood, for work in every skilled craft.
v.GAE: 보석을 깎아 물리며 나무를 새기는 여러 가지 정교한 일을 하게 하셨고
v.KJV: And in the cutting of stones, to set them, and in carving of wood, to make any manner of cunning work.
v.NASB: and in the cutting of stones for settings and in the carving of wood, so as to perform in every inventive work.
v.NIV: to cut and set stones, to work in wood and to engage in all kinds of artistic crafts.
v.NRSV: in cutting stones for setting, and in carving wood, in every kind of craft.
v.SAENEW: 온갖 기술을 발휘하여, 보석을 깎아 물리는 일과, 나무를 조각하는 일을 하게 하셨습니다.
v.WLB: 돌을 깎아 다듬고 나무를 조각하고 온갖 기묘한 작품을 만들게 하신 것이다.

v.CNV: 耶和华又赐给他和但支派中亚希撒抹的儿子亚何利亚伯，心里有教导人的恩赐。
v.ESV: And he has inspired him to teach, both him and Oholiab the son of Ahisamach of the tribe of Dan.
v.GAE: 또 그와 단 지파 아히사막의 아들 오홀리압을 감동시키사 가르치게 하시며
v.KJV: And he hath put in his heart that he may teach, both he, and Aholiab, the son of Ahisamach, of the tribe of Dan.
v.NASB: 'He also has put in his heart to teach, both he and Oholiab, the son of Ahisamach, of the tribe of Dan.
v.NIV: And he has given both him and Oholiab son of Ahisamak, of the tribe of Dan, the ability to teach others.
v.NRSV: And he has inspired him to teach, both him and Oholiab son of Ahisamach, of the tribe of Dan.
v.SAENEW: 또한 주님께서는 그와 단 지파 사람 아히사막의 아들 오홀리압에게는 남을 가르치는 능력도 주셨습니다.
v.WLB: 또한 브살렐의 마음에 가르치는 능력을 주셨는데 브살렐에게만 아니라 단 지파인 아히사막의 아들 오홀리압에게도 주셨다.

v.CNV: 耶和华又用智慧充满他们的心，使他们能作各种工作，雕刻的工，设图案的工，用蓝色紫色朱红色线和细麻刺绣的工，以及编织的工。他们能作各种工程，也能巧设图案。”
v.ESV: He has filled them with skill to do every sort of work done by an engraver or by a designer or by an embroiderer in blue and purple and scarlet yarns and fine twined linen, or by a weaver—by any sort of workman or skilled designer.
v.GAE: 지혜로운 마음을 그들에게 충만하게 하사 여러 가지 일을 하게 하시되 조각하는 일과 세공하는 일과 청색 자색 홍색 실과 가는 베 실로 수 놓는 일과 짜는 일과 그 외에 여러 가지 일을 하게 하시고 정교한 일을 고안하게 하셨느니라
v.KJV: Them hath he filled with wisdom of heart, to work all manner of work, of the engraver, and of the cunning workman, and of the embroiderer, in blue, and in purple, in scarlet, and in fine linen, and of the weaver, even of them that do any work, and of those that devise cunning work.
v.NASB: 'He has filled them with skill to perform every work of an engraver and of a designer and of an embroiderer, in blue and in purple and in scarlet material, and in fine linen, and of a weaver, as performers of every work and makers of designs.
v.NIV: He has filled them with skill to do all kinds of work as engravers, designers, embroiderers in blue, purple and scarlet yarn and fine linen, and weavers—all of them skilled workers and designers.
v.NRSV: He has filled them with skill to do every kind of work done by an artisan or by a designer or by an embroiderer in blue, purple, and crimson yarns, and in fine linen, or by a weaver — by any sort of artisan or skilled designer.
v.SAENEW: 주님께서는 그들에게 기술을 넘치도록 주시어, 온갖 조각하는 일과 도안하는 일을 할 수 있게 하시고, 청색 실과 자주색 실과 홍색 실과 가는 모시 실로 수를 놓아 짜는 일과 같은 모든 일을 할 수 있게 하시고, 여러 가지를 고안하게 하셨습니다.
v.WLB: 그분은 브살렐과 오홀리압에게 모든 일을 잘해 낼 만한 지혜가 가득하게 하셔서 그들이 조각도 하고 고안도 하고 청색 실, 자주색 실, 홍색 실, 고운 베실로 수를 놓고 또 옷도 짜고 하는 모든 일을 하며 여러 가지를 고안하는 일을 직접 하게 하셨다.
